violations.text: The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200-400 ppm. PIC cleaned sanitizer nozzle/pipe during inspection and retested sanitizer solution. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/27/2026

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was less than 50 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. PIC primed machine during inspection and retested. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/27/2026

The concentration of the sanitizer solution for the wet wiping cloths was 0 parts per million (ppm). The required concentration for quat sanitizer is 200-400 ppm. PIC fixed sanitizer dispenser during inspection and refilled buckets. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/27/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2024

The concentration of the sanitizer solution for the wet wiping cloths was 100 parts per million (ppm). The required concentration for quat sanitizer is 200 ppm. PIC refilled sanitizer buckets. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2024
